title: perrottetia excelsa
intro: Perrottetia excelsa, also known as the Mexican plum tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Opiliaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Perrottetia excelsa include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and colds, and even exhibiting antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to create medicinal remedies.
